subject: {player} underperforming, says media report
body:
A media report has highlighted {player}'s recent drop in form, questioning whether the player's potential is being maximized under the current coaching staff.

"{player} is a talented player who seems to be regressing," the report states.

Individual player form is often attributed to coaching quality.

es.subject: {player} rinde por debajo, según informe de prensa
es.body:
Un informe de prensa ha destacado la reciente caída de forma de {player}, cuestionando si se está maximizando su potencial bajo el actual cuerpo técnico.

"{player} es un jugador talentoso que parece estar retrocediendo," afirma el informe.

El estado de forma individual a menudo se atribuye a la calidad del entrenamiento.
